title: 20 board limit in dashboards
excerpt: It would be extremely helpful to have more than a 20 board limit in dashboard widget.  When I loaded the Pro Backup app, it would not allow all boards to be selected, which gives a false sense of the total records being …

posts.author: Rachel7 (Rachel Garrison)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be extremely helpful to have more than a 20 board limit in dashboard widget. When I loaded the Pro Backup app, it would not allow all boards to be selected, which gives a false sense of the total records being backed up.
It is just not accurate to view.
